title: Wireless Bluetooth Headphones
shortDescription: High quality wireless headphones with noise cancellation.
description: Experience immersive sound with premium wireless bluetooth headphones. Designed for comfort and long battery life. Perfect for music lovers and professionals.

title: Smart Fitness Watch
shortDescription: Track your fitness and daily activities easily.
description: Smart fitness watch with heart rate monitor, step tracking, and sleep analysis. Water resistant and long lasting battery included.

title: Gaming Mechanical Keyboard
shortDescription: RGB mechanical keyboard for gaming setup.
description: Durable mechanical keyboard with RGB lighting, fast response keys, and ergonomic design for gaming and productivity.

title: Portable Bluetooth Speaker
description: Portable bluetooth speaker with deep bass and crystal clear sound. Ideal for travel and outdoor use.

title: Laptop Stand Adjustable
description: Improve posture with adjustable aluminum laptop stand. Lightweight and foldable design.

title: Wireless Mouse Pro
description: Professional wireless mouse with silent clicks, ergonomic design, and long battery life.

title: USB-C Hub Multiport
description: Multiport USB-C hub with HDMI, USB 3.0, SD card reader and fast charging support.

title: 4K Monitor 27 inch
description: 27 inch 4K UHD monitor with vibrant colors and thin bezels. Perfect for design and productivity.

title: Office Chair Ergonomic
description: Adjustable ergonomic chair with lumbar support and breathable mesh for long working hours.

title: External SSD 1TB
description: Ultra fast external SSD with 1TB storage. Compact, durable, and ideal for backups.
